Fields.Name: Filter Name ID
Fields.Description: The text ID to use for the name of the sub-filter.

Fields.Name: Filter Category
Fields.Description: The overall category this sub-filter belongs to.

Fields.Name: Conditional Value
Fields.Description: The conditional value this sub-filter uses.

Fields.Name: Display Flag
Fields.Description: The event flag that must be ON for this sub-filter to be present.
